recommendations.title: Contracted
recommendations.overview: A young woman contracts what she believes to be an STD—but it ends up being a far worse disease.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2
recommendations.overview: Inside a darkened house looms a column of TVs littered with VHS tapes, a pagan shrine to forgotten analog gods. The screens crackle and pop endlessly with monochrome vistas of static white noise permeating the brain and fogging concentration. But you
recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.title: Always Shine
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Big Sur, two friends, both actresses, try to reconnect with one another. Once alone, the women's suppressed jealousies and deep-seated resentments begin to rise, causing them to lose their grasp on not only the true nature of their relat

recommendations.title: Tanner Hall
recommendations.overview: A manipulative childhood acquaintance worms her way into a teenager's circle of friends at an all-girls boarding school.

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: Guinea Pig Part 2: Flower of Flesh and Blood
recommendations.overview: A woman kidnapped in the dead of night awakens in a grisly dungeon, where her deranged assailant prepares her body for a morbid ritual.

recommendations.title: The Children's Hour
recommendations.overview: An unruly student at a private all-girls boarding school scandalously accuses the two women who run it of having a romantic relationship.

recommendations.title: Unrest
recommendations.overview: A young pathology med student suspects that the spirit of a dead cadaver in the hospital morgue where she works is killing off all those who handle or desecrate the body.
